{{Quote|Perhaps if Abil can contact some of the Underground's leaders an agreement can be made that will benefit both parties.|[[General/Legends|General]] [[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Carlist Rieekan]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].|<ref name="AIR" />}}
'''Abil Vilorin''' was an [[Agent/Legends|agent]] with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].

==Biography==
Vilorin was the leader of a ten-person cell located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Brosi]]. Vilorin's cell performed surveillance on an area under the influence of the local resistance group known as the [[Brosin Underground]]. Although the Brosin Underground was opposed to the oppressive [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]]-controlled government, their methods made the CSA nervous. Vilorin and their commanders, including [[General/Legends|General]] [[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Carlist Rieekan]], feared the CSA would increase security and find Vilorin's cell—as well as three underground Rebel operatives working as false [[Zinsian]] spin-sealer technicians.<ref name="AIR" />

Vilorin repeatedly attempted to contact one of the leaders of the Brosin Underground, [[Vuraj Marn]], to discuss this issue, and convince him to change the Underground's plans. However, as of [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], Vilorin doubted they would succeed due to the different goals of both resistance groups. Furthermore, Marn proved difficult to find.<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Abil's surname is alternately spelled "Filorin" or "Vilorin" throughout ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''. However, "Vilorin" is used more often, and this article assumes that it is the correct spelling.<ref name="AIR" />
